All States All Specialties How It Works

Audiologist

License Reciprocity by State

National License AuD (Doctor of Audiology)
National Exam Praxis® Examination in Audiology
Renewal Cycle 3 years

Compact States

33

Your home-state license may already cover these states via compact privilege.

State Timeline Extra steps Fee
Alabama Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Arkansas Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Colorado Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Delaware Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Georgia Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Idaho Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Indiana Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Iowa Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Kansas Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Kentucky Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Louisiana Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Maine Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Maryland Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Mississippi Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Missouri Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Montana Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Nebraska Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 New Hampshire Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 North Carolina Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 North Dakota Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Ohio Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Oklahoma Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 South Carolina Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 South Dakota Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Tennessee Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Texas Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Utah Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Vermont Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Virginia Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Washington Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 West Virginia Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Wisconsin Compact privilege Fingerprints $0 Wyoming Compact privilege Fingerprints $0

Endorsement States

18

Requires a separate board application with fee and processing time.

State Timeline Extra steps Fee
Alaska 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Arizona 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 California 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Connecticut 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 District of Columbia 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Florida 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Hawaii 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Illinois 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Massachusetts 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Michigan 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Minnesota 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Nevada 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 New Jersey 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 New Mexico 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 New York 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Oregon 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Pennsylvania 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100 Rhode Island 4 to 6 Weeks Fingerprints $100

Try adjusting your search or clearing your filters.

How to use this directory

Start with the path filter to narrow by compact, endorsement, or CDR. Sort by fee or speed to find your fastest or cheapest route. Open any state to see the full board-verified guide with steps, documents, and renewal info.
